amendments.text: [Means must be provided to allow inspection (including inspection of principal structural elements and control systems), close examination, repair, and replacement of each part requiring maintenance, adjustments for proper alignment and function, lubrication, or servicing.] 67-14; Issued on 04/05/67. --> Link to eCFR --> NPRM ACTIONS:   Notice of Proposed Rulemaking.
